sections.heading: Ads That Stop The Scroll. Conversions That Don't Lie.

items.title: 5-Day Turnaround
items.description: Get high-performing creatives fast. No delays. No excuses. Just speed.

items.title: ROAS-First Thinking
items.description: Every creative is optimized for conversions. We think in terms of revenue, not vanity metrics.

items.title: Crystal Clear Reporting
items.description: See exactly what's working. Weekly performance breakdowns with actionable insights.

items.quote: We went from 1.8x to 4.2x ROAS in the first month. The difference was night and day.
items.author: Sarah Chen

items.quote: CAC dropped 31% while conversion rate improved 23%. That's the kind of performance we needed.
items.author: Marcus Williams

items.quote: CPM down 38%, CTR up 47. Finally, an agency that understands efficiency.
items.author: Priya Kanoor

sections.heading: See Your Custom Winning Strategy
sections.description: A free 30-minute audit to identify your biggest opportunity for growth.

items.question: What's the typical turnaround time?
items.answer: 5 business days from brief to delivery. We prioritize speed without sacrificing quality.

items.question: Is there a long-term commitment?
items.answer: Nope. Start with a single sprint. If you love the results (and you will), we can scale from there.

items.question: How do you report performance?
items.answer: Weekly reports with ROAS, CAC, CTR, conversion rate, and specific creative metrics. Plain English matters. No fluff, just numbers.
